description: Structured registry of CI failure patterns. Each entry has a verification_command so a future occurrence can be detected automatically. Update last_seen + occurrences when a pattern recurs; toggle guard_added once a recurrence guard is committed (field names match the Zod schema).

patterns.title: Missing v0.0.0 bootstrap tag
patterns.summary: git describe in release/version workflows errors when no tag exists in the repo's history.
patterns.guard_pattern: git rev-parse --verify ${TAG}^{commit} >/dev/null 2>&1 OR git describe --tags --abbrev=0 2>/dev/null || echo 'v0.0.0' as a sentinel

patterns.title: Library packages not built before typecheck/test/build
patterns.summary: Workspace packages depend on each other's dist/. Without a pre-build step, downstream jobs fail to resolve types.

patterns.title: next build fails because module-load guards throw without env stubs
patterns.summary: Prisma encryption key, AI audit signing key, and Supabase config are validated at module load. CI build fails at page-data collection unless every workflow that runs next build mirrors the same env-stub block.
patterns.guard_pattern: Mirror ci.yml's Build env block: PRISMA_FIELD_ENCRYPTION_KEY, AI_AUDIT_SIGNING_KEY, stub DATABASE_URL, Supabase stubs
patterns.verification_command:
test "$(grep -l 'PRISMA_FIELD_ENCRYPTION_KEY' .github/workflows/ci.yml .github/workflows/pr-checks.yml .github/workflows/system-audit.yml .github/workflows/release.yml 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' 	
')" = "4" && test "$(grep -l 'AI_AUDIT_SIGNING_KEY' .github/workflows/ci.yml .github/workflows/pr-checks.yml .github/workflows/system-audit.yml .github/workflows/release.yml 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' 	
')" = "4" && test "$(grep -l 'SUPABASE_URL' .github/workflows/ci.yml .github/workflows/pr-checks.yml .github/workflows/system-audit.yml .github/workflows/release.yml 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' 	
')" = "4"

patterns.title: github-actions[bot] direct push to main blocked by branch protection
patterns.summary: Branch protection forbids direct pushes to main, including from GHA bots. Workflows that try to commit results must open a PR instead.
patterns.guard_pattern: Use `gh pr create` against a chore/<timestamp> branch instead of `git push origin main`
patterns.verification_command: ! grep -l 'git push origin main' .github/workflows/*.yml 2>/dev/null && grep -q 'gh pr create' .github/workflows/governance-metrics.yml

patterns.title: SLSA provenance predicate file wrapped in extra envelope
patterns.summary: cosign wraps the predicate body in the SLSA Statement envelope. Including the envelope in the predicate file itself produces a double-wrapped attestation that fails verification.
patterns.guard_pattern: Predicate file contains ONLY the predicate body (no _type, no subject); cosign adds the envelope

patterns.title: Pipeline reports COMPLETE while integration wiring was silently reverted
patterns.summary: An external formatter (Prettier) can revert Edit-tool changes after the validation step passes but before commit. Phase-5 attestation then claims COMPLETE despite the wiring being gone on disk.
patterns.guard_pattern: Re-grep every 'Files to Modify' entry for its expected string immediately before calling generate-final-report.mjs; if an Edit gets reverted, use Write instead.
evidence: Guard text lives at docs/operations/exec-attestation-policy.md (committed) — landed in the PR1 truth-fixes follow-up after the 2026-05-25 audit.
